Index.meta_title: NativPost - AI-powered social media content that sounds like your brand, not a robot.
Index.meta_description: NativPost learns your brand's voice and generates studio-quality captions, graphics, and video, then publishes them automatically across every platform. Built for African and global businesses.

Hero.title: Agency-quality <important>social media content</important>. Your voice. Every platform. Automatically.
Hero.description: Set up your brand profile once. NativPost learns your voice, generates studio-quality content that sounds like you, and publishes it across every platform automatically.

Features.section_title: Everything you need to stop sounding generic online
Features.section_description: NativPost generates content that sounds like your specific brand, filters out anything robotic, and gets better the more you use it.
Features.feature_description: Set up once, and NativPost references it every time it creates content, gets reviewed by your team, and keeps improving the more you use it.

Pricing.section_title: A plan for every stage of your business
Pricing.section_description: Start with a 7-day free trial, no credit card required. Upgrade as your content needs grow, from solo founders to agencies managing multiple brands.

PricingPlan.free_plan_description: For solo founders and small businesses just getting started
PricingPlan.premium_plan_description: For established brands with active social media needs
PricingPlan.enterprise_plan_description: For large organisations needing dedicated support and custom setup

FAQ.question: How is NativPost different from other AI social media tools?
FAQ.answer: Most tools just bolt a basic AI caption feature onto a scheduling app. NativPost is built differently: every piece of content passes through an automated quality filter that catches generic AI patterns, like overused buzzwords and robotic phrasing, before you ever see it. You also get three distinct creative takes on every topic, and the system learns your brand's preferences from every approval, rejection, and edit your team makes.

CTA.title: Ready to stop sounding generic online?
CTA.description: Set up your brand profile once and let NativPost handle the writing, design, and publishing from there.

DashboardIndex.message_state_title: Let's get your brand set up
DashboardIndex.message_state_description: Start by completing your Brand Profile so NativPost can learn your tone, vocabulary, and style before generating content. You can update it anytime from dashboard/brand-profile.

Need a hand getting started? Check out our quick-start guide covering Brand Profile setup, connecting your
social accounts, and generating your first batch of content. Try <url></url>.
DashboardIndex.max_message: Or, want NativPost to message you directly on WhatsApp, Telegram, or Discord? Try <url></url>.
